summary: Average New Year’s run performance with a standout “Never Trust A Woman”, while the recording source and fidelity are not described.
review: The third night of this early‑’80s New Year's run is viewed as solid but not spectacular, with reviewers noting the familiar “what haven’t we played” vibe and singling out “Never Trust A Woman” as a highlight. No specific comments about the soundboard or audience capture are provided, so the recording quality remains uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers describe the show as average to good with one clear song highlight; lack of any recording‑quality commentary keeps the overall rating modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned sound clarity, mix balance, or source type, so recording quality cannot be confidently assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Third night of a New Year’s run; reviewers felt it lacked the novelty of earlier nights but remained a solid, consistent performance.
